info.name: Apartment Web Server API
info.description:
API collection for Apartment Web Server - Authentication & User Management

## Variables
- **language**: Set to 'en' (English) or 'vi' (Vietnamese) to change response language

exec: // Add Accept-Language header to all requests

variable.description: Reset token from OTP/magic link verify (auto-filled)
Magic link token from email (manual entry)

request.description: Check if the server is running

item.name: Signup

request.description: Check if an email is available for registration
Send OTP to email for signup verification
Verify OTP code submitted by user. Returns session token on success (auto-saved to signupSessionToken variable).
Resend OTP to email (tracks resend count)
Complete signup with user profile data. Requires valid session token from OTP verification.

item.description: Signup flow endpoints: Check email → Send OTP → Verify OTP → Complete signup

item.name: Login

request.description: Login as Admin user (admin@test.com / Admin@123)
Login as normal User (user@test.com / User@123)
Login as Inactive user - should return error (inactive@test.com / Inactive@123)
Login as Unverified user - should return error (unverified@test.com / Unverified@123)
Send OTP to email for passwordless login
Verify OTP and login user. Returns access token and sets refresh token cookie.
Send magic link to email for passwordless login
Verify magic link token and login user. Returns access token and sets refresh token cookie.

item.description:
Login endpoints with seeded test users:

- **Admin**: admin@test.com / Admin@123
- **User**: user@test.com / User@123
- **Inactive**: inactive@test.com (should fail)
- **Unverified**: unverified@test.com (should fail)

request.description: Refresh access token using refresh token from cookie. Make sure cookies are enabled in Postman settings.

item.name: Unlock Account

request.description: Request unlock for a locked account. Sends a temporary password via email. Returns success even for non-existent emails (prevents enumeration).

item.name: Request Unlock - Non-Existent Email (Still Returns Success)

request.description: Request unlock for a non-existent email. Returns success to prevent email enumeration.

item.name: Request Unlock - Account Not Locked (Should Fail 400)

request.description: Request unlock for an account that is NOT locked. Should return 400 - account not locked.
Request unlock for a disabled/inactive account. Should return 400 - account disabled.
Request unlock immediately after a previous request (within 60s cooldown). Should return 400 - cooldown active.

item.name: Request Unlock - Rate Limit Exceeded (Should Fail 429)

request.description: Request unlock after exceeding 3 requests per hour. Should return 429 - rate limit exceeded.

item.name: Request Unlock - Validation Error Missing Email (Should Fail 422)

request.description: Request unlock without providing email. Should return 422 - validation error.

item.name: Request Unlock - Validation Error Invalid Email (Should Fail 422)

request.description: Request unlock with invalid email format. Should return 422 - validation error.
Verify unlock with valid temp password from email. Returns access token (auto-saved) and sets refresh token cookie. Replace 'your-temp-password-here' with the actual temp password received via email.

item.name: Verify Unlock - Account Not Found (Should Fail 401)

request.description: Verify unlock for a non-existent account. Should return 401 - invalid temp password.

item.name: Verify Unlock - Wrong Temp Password (Should Fail 401)

request.description: Verify unlock with incorrect temp password. Should return 401 - invalid temp password.

item.name: Verify Unlock - Expired Temp Password (Should Fail 401)

request.description: Verify unlock with an expired temp password (after 15 minutes). Should return 401 - temp password expired.

item.name: Verify Unlock - Already Used Temp Password (Should Fail 401)

request.description: Verify unlock with a temp password that was already used. Should return 401 - invalid temp password.

item.name: Verify Unlock - Validation Error Missing Fields (Should Fail 422)

request.description: Verify unlock without providing email and tempPassword. Should return 422 - validation error.

item.name: Verify Unlock - Validation Error Short Temp Password (Should Fail 422)

request.description: Verify unlock with temp password shorter than 12 characters. Should return 422 - validation error.

item.description:
Unlock account flow for locked accounts:

1. **Request Unlock**: POST /auth/unlock/request - Sends temp password to email
2. **Verify Unlock**: POST /auth/unlock/verify - Verify temp password and login

Constraints:
- Cooldown: 60 seconds between requests
- Rate limit: 3 requests per hour
- Temp password expires after 15 minutes
- Temp password can only be used once

request.description: Send OTP for password recovery. Returns success even if email does not exist (anti-enumeration).

item.name: Send OTP - Invalid Email Format (Should Fail 422)

request.description: Send OTP with invalid email format. Should return 422 validation error.
Send OTP without email field. Should return 422 validation error.
Send OTP for non-existent email. Should return 200 (fake success) to prevent email enumeration.
Send OTP again within 60s cooldown window. Should return 400 with cooldown message. Run "Send OTP - Happy Path" first.
Verify OTP and receive reset token. Copy OTP from email before running. Auto-saves resetToken to collection variable.
Verify with wrong OTP. Should return 401 with remaining attempts count.

item.name: Verify OTP - Missing OTP Field (Should Fail 422)

request.description: Verify without OTP field. Should return 422 validation error.

item.name: Verify OTP - Invalid OTP Format (Should Fail 422)

request.description: Verify with non-numeric OTP. Should return 422 validation error.
Send magic link for password recovery. Returns success even if email does not exist (anti-enumeration).

item.name: Send Magic Link - Invalid Email Format (Should Fail 422)

request.description: Send magic link with invalid email format. Should return 422 validation error.

item.name: Send Magic Link - Cooldown Active (Should Fail 400)

request.description: Send magic link again within 60s cooldown. Should return 400. Run "Send Magic Link - Happy Path" first.
Verify magic link token and receive reset token. Copy token from email URL before running. Auto-saves resetToken.

item.name: Verify Magic Link - Invalid Token (Should Fail 401)

request.description: Verify with wrong magic link token. Should return 401.

item.name: Verify Magic Link - Missing Token (Should Fail 422)

request.description: Verify without token field. Should return 422 validation error.

item.name: Verify Magic Link - Invalid Token Format (Should Fail 422)

request.description: Verify with token that is too short. Should return 422 validation error.
Reset password using reset token from OTP or magic link verification. Run verify first to get the reset token.

item.name: Reset Password - Invalid Reset Token (Should Fail 401)

request.description: Reset password with invalid/expired reset token. Should return 401.
Reset password with weak password (too short, missing complexity). Should return 422 validation error.
Reset password without resetToken and newPassword. Should return 422 validation error.

item.name: Reset Password - Invalid Reset Token Format (Should Fail 422)

request.description: Reset password with non-hex reset token format. Should return 422 validation error.
Logout user and clear session. Requires valid access token in Authorization header.
